artifacts.summary: Official Keio discovery found a student-facing ChatGPT/generative AI announcement and a Keio ITC generative AI usage guideline with Japanese canonical text and an English mirror. Public-relations commentary and a research-center policy recommendation were rejected for this staged university-policy run because they do not directly establish operational student, teaching, research, or IT usage rules for Keio members.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 生成AIは、事実に基づかない情報(ハルシネーション)を生成することがあります。生成された情報については、必ず一次情報(元の論文や信頼できる資料など)に基づいて裏付けを取り、事実確認(ファクトチェック)を行うことが強く推奨されます。

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow student guidance claim scoped to course, faculty, graduate-school, or instructor policy.
Approved because the official student announcement directly says AI-created reports and similar work need clear indication.
Approved because the source directly says generative AI is not permitted when independent work is required for class assignments or exams.
Approved as a source-scope claim about the guideline's target audience.
Approved because the ITC guideline directly addresses prompt and attachment handling for non-corporate AI services.
Approved with recommended/strongly recommended wording preserved from the source.
Approved as research guidance scoped to the ITC guideline's discussion of research transparency, reproducibility, and researcher responsibility.
Approved with the July 2025 trial and standard-feature limitation preserved.
Approved because the ITC guideline directly warns that Google AI Studio is outside Keio tenant services and may collect or use entered data.
Approved as a narrow responsibility statement from the ITC guideline, not as legal or academic-integrity advice.

artifacts.title: Keio University staged AI policy source review
artifacts.summary: Staged review found official Keio student guidance for ChatGPT and generative AI use in coursework, plus the Keio ITC generative AI usage guideline covering all students, graduate students, faculty, and staff. Claims are limited to course/instructor authorization, disclosure, no AI where independent work is required, information handling, fact-checking, research responsibility, Keio-contracted Gemini/NotebookLM, Google AI Studio cautions, and user responsibility.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Original Japanese evidence is canonical for the student announcement and Japanese ITC guideline; English snippets are helper translations.
Public-relations commentary and research-center AI policy recommendations were not used as evidence for Keio operational policy claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
